pipeline.global_model_policy: Single BTC-trained model retrained monthly, reused across all coins
pipeline.per_coin_calibration: Enabled (threshold, trade mode, position scale) using trailing historical window only

autorresearch.anti_cheat_note: Oracle trades are used only for verification/scoring, never as training targets.

anti_cheat_note: Oracle path is computed from future returns and used only for verification. Training and calibration use historical data only.
